title: Dashboard app scaffold on the house frontend stack
purpose: Stand up apps/aion-dashboard as a workspace member on the exact apps/web stack, so every later brief builds on a familiar, house-consistent foundation that the aion-server can serve as static assets.
task: Create the apps/aion-dashboard Vite single-page application matching apps/web: React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind v4, Bun, Biome (100-char), shadcn/Radix primitives. Wire house scripts, a base-path-configurable build, the SPA entry, and the shadcn primitives directory. No application features yet — this is the shell of the project.

requirements.title: Workspace member and house scripts
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL create apps/aion-dashboard as a workspace member whose package.json declares the same script set as apps/web (dev, build, preview, check, format, typecheck) and the same toolchain (React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind v4, Bun, Biome).
acceptance: apps/aion-dashboard/package.json exists, is registered in the workspace, and declares dev (vite), build (vite build), preview, check (biome check .), format, and typecheck (tsc --noEmit).
Dependencies match the apps/web stack versions (React 19, Vite 7, Tailwind v4, @biomejs/biome, TanStack Query); no alternate framework, styling system, or state library is introduced.
biome.json mirrors apps/web's config including the 100-char line width.
bun install resolves cleanly for the new workspace member.

requirements.title: Vite build with configurable base path and SPA entry
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL configure Vite to build a static SPA bundle and to accept a configurable base path so aion-server (AW) can serve the bundle under a sub-path. THE SYSTEM SHALL provide the SPA entry (index.html) and the React root mount (src/main.tsx).
acceptance: vite.config.ts uses the React and Tailwind v4 plugins and reads the base path from an env var (defaulting to '/') so AW can mount the bundle under a sub-path.
index.html is the SPA entry referencing src/main.tsx.
src/main.tsx mounts the React root into the document.
bun run build produces a static bundle in dist/.

requirements.title: shadcn/Radix UI primitive surface
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL provide the shadcn/Radix UI primitives the dashboard needs under src/components/ui, configured the same way apps/web configures shadcn.
acceptance: components.json (or equivalent shadcn config) is present and matches apps/web's conventions.
src/components/ui contains at least the primitives later briefs require (badge, select, table, skeleton, tooltip, button) sourced from shadcn/Radix.
A trivial render test mounting one primitive compiles and passes.
bun run check passes on the scaffold.

boundaries: SHALL NOT add any application feature (list, detail, live feed) — those are AU-004, AU-005, AU-009.
SHALL NOT define wire types or the REST/WebSocket client — AU-002, AU-003.
SHALL NOT define server endpoints, the WebSocket protocol, or asset hosting — that is cluster AW.
verification: bun run build produces a static bundle.
No lint-disable comments added to silence findings.
